zh.lifeSummary: 當William Brocas於大約1379年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir Bernard Brocas Jnr27歲，母親Joan de Middleton23歲。他於1398年11月之前與Sybilla在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1456年4月29日在他的家鄉享年78歲，埋葬在英國哈普爾蒙克 黑爾波內。

nameMeanings.name: Brocas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2  French: locative name from Brocas in Les Landes, SW France.

variants.name: Brookhouse
meanings: English: topographic name for a house by a stream, from Middle English brok(e) ‘brook’ + hous ‘house’, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Brookhouse in Laughton (Yorkshire).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Brocas was born about 1379, in England, his father, Sir Bernard Brocas Jnr, was 27 and his mother, Joan de Middleton, was 23. He married Sybilla before November 1398, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 29 April 1456, in his hometown, at the age of 78, and was buried in Monk Sherborne, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Brocas est né environ 1379, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Bernard Brocas Jnr, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan de Middleton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Sybilla avant novembre 1398, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 29 avril 1456, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Monk Sherborne, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Brocas um 1379 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Bernard Brocas Jnr 27 und seine Mutter Joan de Middleton 23. Er hat vor November 1398 in England Sybilla geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 29. April 1456 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Monk Sherborne, Hampshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Brocas è nato il circa 1379 nel England, il suo padre, Sir Bernard Brocas Jnr, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Middleton, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Sybilla prima del novembre 1398, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 29 aprile 1456, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Monk Sherborne, Hampshire, England.

ko.Winchester St John, Winchester, Hampshir: 영국 함프실르 윈체스터 윈체스터 스트 존
ko.lifeSummary: William Brocas(이)가 대략 1379년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Bernard Brocas Jnr(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Middleton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1398년 11월 이전 영국에서 Sybilla(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1456년 4월 29일 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 함프실르 몬크 셔본에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Brocas nasceu aproximadamente 1379, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Bernard Brocas Jnr, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Middleton, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybilla antes novembro de 1398, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 29 de abril de 1456, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Monk Sherborne, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Winchester St John, Winchester, Hampshir: винчестир ст джон, винчестир, хампшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Brocas родился около 1379 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Bernard Brocas Jnr было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Middleton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybilla перед ноябрь 1398 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 29 апреля 1456 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности монк ширборн, хампшир, Англия.

Se casó con Sybilla antes de noviembre de 1398, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 29 de abril de 1456, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Monk Sherborne, Hampshire, Inglaterra.
